mapper.select: SELECT fr.id, fr.form_rule_code, fr.form_rule_name, fr.api_method, fr.api_uri, fr.sort, fr.create_time, fr.create_by, fr.update_time, fr.update_by, fr.remark, fr.version, COUNT( fri.id ) item_count FROM mdm_form_rule fr LEFT JOIN mdm_form_rule_item fri ON fri.form_rule_code = fr.form_rule_code AND fri.deleted = 0 WHERE fr.deleted = 0 AND form_rule_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{formRuleCode}, '%') AND form_rule_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{formRuleName}, '%') AND api_method = #{apiMethod} AND api_uri LIKE CONCAT('%', #{apiUri}, '%') GROUP BY fr.id
